options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <X1> # coordinate x1 of the partition cut area (float, required) <Y1> # coordinate y1 of the partition cut area (float, required) <X2> # coordinate x2 of the partition cut area (float, required) <Y2> # coordinate y2 of the partition cut area (float, required) <PartitionName> # name of the partition cut area
